sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀγγαρεύω

- Transliteration: Aggareuo

- Phonetic: ang-ar-yew'-o

- Definition:

1. to employ a courier, dispatch a mounted messenger, press into public service, compel to go

- Origin: of foreign origin, cf G104

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Of foreign origin (compare [H104]); properly to be a courier that is (by implication) to press into public service: - compel (to go).
